note: Runtime atlas for the Khosrow macOS app. Grid + frameCounts are derived from pixels; clip identities are inferred from the contact sheet; the state map is a tunable UX decision. pet.json is the identity source of truth and is embedded verbatim below.

pet.description: A regal human Iranian warrior king in Sasanian-inspired ceremonial dress, with a winged crown and sheathed sword.

idle.description: Neutral standing stance, sword sheathed; near-static breathing.

walk_left.description: Striding walk cycle, body angled to the left.

run_left.description: Energetic run cycle, long strides, to the left.

cheer.description: Right arm raised high in a wave / triumphant salute.

crouch.description: Lowers into a deep squat / crouch.

bow.description: Deep ceremonial bow, folding head and torso forward/down.

present.description: Both arms open outward in a presenting / explaining gesture.

idle_guard.description: Alert front stance holding the sword; calm standby.

ready.description: Grips and handles the sword in front; 'working' posture.

walk_right.description: Side-profile walk cycle facing right; scanning.

run_right.description: Side-profile run cycle facing right, head dipping.

attentive.rationale: Engaged and attentive — Gemini illustrated pose (gemini-attentive, hand to chin); falls back to the open-armed 'present' clip if the still is absent.

writing.rationale: Composing a response to your prompt — dedicated Gemini illustrated pose (gemini-writing, writing in an open book). No longer reuses the reading art; falls back to the calm idle_guard clip.

reading.rationale: Reads an open book: bundled hand-drawn khosrow-reading-* frames (falls back to the calm idle_guard clip if absent).

searching.rationale: Scanning the codebase — Gemini illustrated pose (gemini-searching, hand shading his eyes); falls back to the walk_right clip.

editing.rationale: Handling the sword = actively editing files.

runningCommand.rationale: Executing a command — Gemini illustrated pose (gemini-running, on horseback at a gallop); falls back to the run_left clip.

waitingForPermission.rationale: Waiting for you — Gemini illustrated pose (gemini-waiting, checking his wrist); falls back to the 'present' clip.

praying.rationale: Praying / reflecting — a first-class built-in mood with its own Gemini illustrated pose (gemini-praying, hands raised in reverence). It has NO automatic hook trigger by default; it is shown only when manually previewed or by a user-created rule. Falls back to the calm idle_guard clip if the still is absent.

success.rationale: Raises his sword in triumph: bundled hand-drawn khosrow-success-* frames (falls back to the cheer clip if absent).

failure.rationale: Head-down bow reads as apology/defeat on failure.

sleeping.rationale: Sleeps in a hand-drawn bed: bundled khosrow-sleeping-* frames (falls back to the idle clip if absent).
